The Ruins (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,432,844Details
International Box Office $5,477,719
Worldwide Box Office $22,910,563
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,918,396
Total $10,918,396
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A group of friends become entangled in a brutal struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle—where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,003,421 (45.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:76.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,812 opening theaters/2,814 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,038,557

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 4th, 2008 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: July 8th, 2008 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and gruesome images, language, some sexuality and nudity.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Killer Plants, Surprise Twist, Tourists In Trouble
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Spyglass Entertainment, Red Hour Productions
Production Countries: United States, Australia
Languages: English
